message: Command `for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"exit_code":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ "$exit_code" != "0" ]; then echo "CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code"; echo "$result"; break; fi; done; echo "All tests completed"` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments: {"command": "for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh \"$poc\" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo \"$result\" | grep -o '\"exit_code\":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ \"$exit_code\" != \"0\" ]; then echo \"CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code\"; echo \"$result\"; break; fi; done; echo \"All tests completed\""}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command: for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"exit_code":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ "$exit_code" != "0" ]; then echo "CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code"; echo "$result"; break; fi; done; echo "All tests completed"

metadata.suffix: [The command has no new output after 10 seconds. You may wait longer to see additional output by sending empty command '', send other commands to interact with the current process, or send keys to interrupt/kill the command.]
